column1: # WSE-3 hardware run matrix for the Picasso scaling study.
#   test_name | grid_rows | num_pes | impl | golden_dir | max_minutes
# impl is one of: sw-relay, 2d_seg2, east_seg
# Layout: smoke trio (3 small) -> medium (8x8 / 1x64) -> large (16x16) ->
# max_minutes is a soft warning threshold; runs that exceed it print a
# warning but the wsjob is NOT auto-cancelled.
# --- smoke trio: same test on all three implementations ---
# --- top-end 2d_seg2 scaling probe (newly enabled by cap lift) ---
